findings.description: Footer text improperly ordered within header block
findings.evidence: In the HTML, the footer text containing website URLs and 'Equal Opportunity' statement is placed between the Governor/Secretary names and the Division contact addresses, interrupting the logical flow of the header section.

findings.description: Footer text inserted into body content reading order
findings.evidence: The footer text from the bottom of page 1 in the PDF is inserted inline between body paragraphs in the HTML, disrupting the continuous reading flow of the document's main content.
